title: Docs-writer guidance fixes canonical argument wording and note placement
description: A sanitized direct docs-writer scenario where an existing resource page drifts on canonical enum wording and default placement, and the correct output should edit the page in place without inventing unsupported schema claims.

scope.notes: Sanitized fixture models a real docs-writer request against an existing docs page without retaining live PR identity. The modeled changed path stays under `website/docs/` for realistic skill routing, while the fixture content lives under `tools/regression/fixtures/`.

mustCatch.description: The docs-writer response should restore canonical `Possible values are` phrasing for the argument bullet.
The docs-writer response should keep the default value inline in the argument bullet rather than moving it into a detached note.

mustNotFlag.description: The response must not invent schema, enum, or import-ID claims that are not supported by implementation evidence.
The response must not treat scaffolding as the default remediation for an existing docs page.

notes: Use this as the direct docs-writer skill benchmark for existing-page remediation without scaffold drift.
